summary: Website for OM COLLECTION, a cloth business located in Baramkela, Chhattisgarh, India (PIN: 496551). Now expanding to include a product catalogue with upload functionality and pricing/rates management.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Placeholder product image for Men's Wear clothing category card, warm saffron and maroon tones, fabric texture feel (mens-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
- Placeholder product image for Women's Wear clothing category card, warm gold and maroon tones, elegant saree/ethnic fabric (womens-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
- Placeholder product image for Kids' Wear clothing category card, bright warm tones, cheerful traditional fabric pattern (kids-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
- Placeholder product image for Traditional/Ethnic Wear clothing category card, rich deep maroon and gold embroidery pattern (ethnic-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage hero section displaying the business name 'OM COLLECTION', a tagline about quality clothing, and a call-to-action button (e.g., 'Explore Collection'). Include the business location: Baramkela, Chhattisgarh, India – PIN 496551.

Create a 'Featured Collections' or 'Our Products' section showcasing categories of clothing (e.g., Men's Wear, Women's Wear, Kids' Wear, Traditional/Ethnic Wear) with placeholder product cards including a name and price label.
Add an 'About Us' section describing OM COLLECTION as a trusted cloth business in Baramkela, Chhattisgarh, highlighting quality products and local service.
Add a 'Contact Us' section with the business address (Baramkela, Chhattisgarh, India – PIN 496551) and placeholder fields for name, phone number, and message with a submit button.
Add a responsive navigation bar with the 'OM COLLECTION' brand name/logo and links to page sections: Home, Collections, About, Contact.
Add a footer with the business name 'OM COLLECTION', location (Baramkela, Chhattisgarh, India – 496551), and a short copyright notice.

Apply a warm, elegant visual theme inspired by Indian textile traditions — use rich saffron/gold and deep maroon as primary colors, clean serif or stylized typography, and a layout that evokes a premium traditional cloth store feel. Apply this theme consistently across all sections.
Render generated static image assets from frontend/public/assets/generated throughout the site (hero banner, product category placeholder images).

Build a Catalogue page displaying all products from the backend in a responsive grid. Each product card must show the product image, name, category badge, and price in Indian Rupees (₹). The page must include filter/sort controls by category. Style consistently with the existing warm saffron/gold and maroon theme.

Add an Admin Upload page (accessible via a link in the navigation bar) with a form to add a new product to the catalogue. The form must include fields for: Product Name, Category (dropdown), Price in ₹ (numeric input), Image URL, and Description. On submission, call the backend addProduct function and refresh the catalogue. Include basic client-side validation (all fields required, price must be a positive number).
Add a navigation link to the 'Catalogue' page in the existing responsive navigation bar, alongside the existing Home, Collections, About, and Contact links.

new_feature_requests.summary: Business website for OM COLLECTION cloth store with location info (Baramkela, Chhattisgarh, PIN 496551)
Product catalogue page displaying items with images and rates/prices
Upload functionality to add new products to the catalogue with name, image, and rate/price

Create a backend data model and API for products, each with fields: id, name, category (e.g. Men's Wear, Women's Wear, Kids' Wear, Traditional/Ethnic Wear), price (Nat), imageUrl (Text), and description (Text). Implement CRUD operations: addProduct, getProducts, getProductById, updateProduct, deleteProduct.
